race.comment: AMOR PERFECTO (11) finished 8 lengths adrift in eighth last time at this track in a disappointing performance. Looks well placed so expect a big run this time. FELIPHON (2) missed the frame last time when 12th at this track. Prior to that had been in the money on two consecutive occasions. Has the speed to be prominent. Among the leading chances. CATITA REVOLTOSA (5) finished out of the money two starts back then was beaten 8 lengths when sixth in a 1200m contest at this track a week-and-a-half ago. Well placed and there is no reason she cannot find winning ways. JAVIVALETU (1) missed the placings two runs back then didn't do any better last start when 17 lengths away in 15th over 1200m at this track. Well placed to make amends.
